label: offensive
rationale: Personal insult ('pussy', 'coward') directed at an individual politician, no protected characteristic.

label: offensive
rationale: Crude personal and political attack ('kulamba himyama ya broad based haga'), no ethnic targeting.

label: neither
rationale: Quoting a politician's claim about political harassment ('anatumiwa kuhangaisha Wakikuyu'), not expressing ethnic contempt.

label: neither
rationale: Advising a community against tribalism ('waaje fujo na kutema ukabila'), no contempt or attack.

label: neither
rationale: Mild personal banter or political disagreement ('disturbed heart and brain'), not group-based hate.

label: neither
rationale: Mild personal criticism of a politician ('stingy af').

label: neither
rationale: Political analysis of a community's protest participation ('Kalenjins won't take part in protests'), no ethnic contempt.

label: neither
rationale: Electoral and political taunting directed at a voting bloc ('Presidency hamtaona'), not hate.

label: offensive
rationale: Harsh personal insults against a politician ('mjinga', 'Mpumbavu mkubwa sana'), not ethnic-based.

label: hate
rationale: Categorically declaring people of a specific national origin unfit to hold power ('won’t survive if we allow African-born socialists to rule us').

label: neither
rationale: Satirical list of various political and online factions, no direct attack on a protected group.

label: neither
rationale: Criticism directed at a political party, which is not a protected characteristic.

label: neither
rationale: Appears to be sarcastic criticism of government apathy towards killings by 'government goons', rather than actual approval of violence.

label: neither
rationale: Criticism of an ethnic voting bloc's political behavior ('mutakula na mupeane kura'), not hate or contempt.

label: neither
rationale: Long political critique of a community's political alliances and leaders, discussing past stereotypes without endorsing them.

label: offensive
rationale: Abusive language directed at a politician and his supporters ('umbwa za gachietha'), not an ethnic group.

label: hate
rationale: Attacks a politician using an ethnic/cultural slur ('kihii') and implies they belong in another country ('waendee... South Sudan').

label: neither
rationale: Mild political criticism ('biggest hypocrite') of an individual.

label: offensive
rationale: Harsh criticism and name-calling directed at politicians and a political coalition ('KK criminals', '#UDAidiots').

label: neither
rationale: Discussion of ethnic-bloc political influence ('your people will control his presidency'), no contempt.

label: neither
rationale: Political comparison involving an ethnic voting bloc ('politically wise than matiangi and kisiis'), no contempt.

label: hate
rationale: Attacks a politician using an ethnically-tied cultural slur ('disgusting kipii').

label: neither
rationale: Political mobilization against the government with criticism of foreign deals ('Washauza nchi yetu kwa Waarabu'), not direct hate against a community.

label: neither
rationale: In-group political frustration using rhetorical self-deprecation ('Kikuyu hatuna akili'), not intended to stir up ethnic hatred.

label: offensive
rationale: Personal insults and abusive language directed at a politician ('asshole nigga', 'Moojinga').
